notes: Generated output captures the squid's overall horizontal pose and fin/mantle/arm layout but reads as a noisy edge-trace rather than a clean FAO ink plate, with broken outlines and scattered debris stipple instead of disciplined linework.
specific_issues: mantle and fin outline is jittery/broken rather than a single clean continuous contour
stipple is scattered as random speckles instead of being concentrated in chromatophore/shadow fields
eye is rendered as a tiny edge-trace artifact, not an almond outline with a filled pupil
arms read as flat tapered strips without ring suckers or interior structure
tentacles are merged/lost — the long tentacular stalks visible in the photo are not clearly separated from the arms
output reads as photo-edge-detection clutter rather than scientific plate restraint
no internal anatomical landmarks (funnel, mantle opening, gladius) suggested
silhouette is recognisable as the same animal in pose but proportions of head/funnel and arm spread are distorted
